name: Cold Spicy Tomato Soup with Avocado and Chives
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup well-chilled chicken or vegetable broth
salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill a large pot with water and bring to a boil.
2. Core each tomato and make a small "X" in the skin on the opposite end.
3. Lower 2 or 3 tomatoes into the boiling water for 15 to 20 seconds, or until the skins start to peel.
4. Immediately transfer the tomatoes to a large bowl of ice water.
5. Blanch the remaining tomatoes using the same method.
6. Peel each tomato by pulling the skins off with a paring knife.
7. Cut each tomato in half crosswise and remove the seeds.
8. Coarsely chop the seeded tomatoes.
9. In a blender or food processor, puree the garlic clove and chopped tomatoes.
10. Add the broth, cumin, salt, pepper, 1 tablespoon lime juice, continuing to puree until smooth.
11. Pour the soup into a metal bowl, set the bowl in a bowl of ice water, and stir occasionally until very cold.
12. Taste and adjust seasoning with tabasco sauce, salt, pepper, and lime juice.
13. Divide the avocado and chives between two chilled bowls and ladle the soup over them.
Yield: 3 cups, 2 servings
